nodes.name: coding-style.md
nodes.summary: Nuxt-specific coding-style rules covering directory layout, auto-imports discipline, compiler macros, config-file separation, and head/meta handling. Extends the common coding-style baseline.

nodes.name: hooks.md
nodes.summary: Nuxt-specific hook rules defining typecheck, lint, and format commands plus a suggested PostToolUse chain for automated quality gates. Extends the common hooks baseline.

nodes.name: patterns.md
nodes.summary: Nuxt-specific architectural patterns covering data-fetch selection, shared state, Nitro server routes, route middleware, and hydration-safe rendering. Extends the common patterns baseline.

nodes.name: security.md
nodes.summary: Nuxt-specific security rules covering runtimeConfig public/private separation, server-route input validation, SSR payload leakage, cookie/auth passthrough, and SSRF on server $fetch. Extends the common security baseline.

nodes.name: testing.md
nodes.summary: Nuxt-specific testing rules covering test setup, runtime helpers, E2E helpers, and guidance on what to test at which level. Extends the common testing baseline.
